programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: L'instant mobile
programme.desc: Une émission d'information au format court qui traite des sujets les plus captivants venus du monde entier. À travers des reportages dynamiques et un regard incisif, elle propose un condensé de l'actualité internationale pour rester informé rapidement et efficacement.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: Dans les hebdos
programme.desc: Avec des reportages des correspondants sur le terrain et des interviews de personnalités phares, retrouvez l'actualité mondiale qui bouge et qui change. Toute l'actualité internationale avec les décryptages des journalistes de France 24.

programme.title: Au coeur de l'info : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Une immersion au cœur de l'information pour analyser les faits marquants du jour et en comprendre les implications. L'émission propose également des éclairages sur les grands enjeux internationaux, afin d'offrir une lecture claire et approfondie de l'actualité mondiale.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. E1 - Women Who Kill - Thelma Yvonne Purchase
programme.desc: Greg Baker was a mathematician and calligrapher, and a devout Christian. He was disabled and reliant on caregivers. One of those was Thelma Yvonne Purchase, who took his life to get her hands on his money.

programme.title: E3 - Emilia Carr
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: E126 - Brother's Down
programme.desc: In Tulsa, two men are murdered in a parking lot, but a gun from another shooting incident leads detectives to their suspect. As prosecutors prepare for the trial, key evidence goes missing.

programme.title: E1 - Women Who Kill - Thelma Yvonne Purchase
programme.desc: Greg Baker was a mathematician and calligrapher, and a devout Christian. He was disabled and reliant on caregivers. One of those was Thelma Yvonne Purchase, who took his life to get her hands on his money.

programme.title: E11 - Molly Jane Matheson
programme.desc: When reliable 22-year-old, Molly Jane Matheson, didn't show up for work, her mother Tracy drove to her Fort Worth, Texas apartment to check on her.

programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: E106 - The Lost Egg / The Elf Games
programme.desc: Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird find an egg. A chick hatches from the egg and the children must find the mummy bird. // Ben is in training for the Elf Games. Holly wants to join in but the rules state there is no flying or magic allowed.

programme.title: E401 - The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Sh
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: E141 - Chloe's Puppet Show
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit their cousin Chloe's house, where they put on a puppet show about a pig who snores a lot. Daddy Pig and Uncle Pig miss the show as they are too busy snoring.

programme.title: E140 - Very Hot Day
programme.desc: It is a super hot day, and all the mud puddles have dried up, so Peppa and George play in the wading pool.

programme.title: E301 - Pups Find A Genie / Pups Save A Tightrope Walker
programme.desc: Rubble finds an old brass Jack in the Box, with a genie inside who grants him three wishes! // Francois Turbot is bravely walking a tightrope, but seagulls threaten to ruin his act. Time to call the PAW Patrol!

programme.title: E304 - Singin' In The Tub / Show And Share
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny gain the confidence to sing at the Canta Conmigo show. // Dora helps Boots find a special Heart Banana to show everyone at Show and Share.

programme.title: E207 - Don't Go Grandma / Stuck / Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia try to stop Grandma from leaving, so they can spend more time with her / When Terri & Tommy get locked in the Garden Dome, they must put their differences aside to try to escape / Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.

programme.title: E220 - Pups Save The Mayor's Race / Pups Save An Outlaw's Loot
programme.desc: It's the annual Mayor's Race, and Mayor Humdinger is planning his most devious cheating scheme yet. // When Ryder comes across a map for buried treasure, Mayor Humdinger snatches the map and runs off to find the loot for himself.

programme.title: E1010 - Liberty's Mountain Rescue / Pups Save A Flying Farmer Yumi
programme.desc: Liberty comes to visit the pups just in time to help save the Turbots and their radar doppler in a daring mountain rescue. // When Farmer Al builds a windmill, the wind takes Farmer Yumi and Garby on a wild flight.

programme.title: E114 - The Treasure Hunt / Going Into The Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.desc: The ladies' Italian adventure comes to a dramatic end with an explosive final dinner that leaves longstanding friendships fractured.

programme.title: E19 - Reunion, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The reunion kicks off with some of the ladies seeking resolution while others remain doubtful following an emotionally charged season.

programme.title: E21 - Reunion, Pt. 3
programme.desc: The reunion concludes as relationships in the group reach a breaking point.

programme.title: E1 - Hot Girl Summer
programme.desc: Dorit has recently filed for divorce and opens up to the ladies about her ex, their children and if she's ready for a Hot Girl Summer. Kyle is planning Alexia's wedding and navigating life with Mauricio. Sutton must reassess her friendships in the group after being cut off by her former bestie. A familiar face makes a fashionable entrance at Kyle's Summer Solstice Party as Kathy arrives with Rachel Zoe.

programme.title: E3 - A Match Made In Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Boz hosts a speed-dating event where Erika struggles while Kyle discusses her separation. Rachel encourages a post-annulment Sutton to move on, and Dorit seeks financial advice from 'Money Queen' Amanda.

programme.title: E6 - Star Signs And Bad Times
programme.desc: Rachel hosts a psychic party where Sutton and Jennifer Tilly face off. Boz pursues fertility treatments in Nevada. Dorit confronts Amanda about her marriage, only to learn of Amanda's past tragic loss.

programme.title: E7 - Headlines And Heartbreak
programme.desc: After a tearful departure from Rachel's psychic dinner, Amanda turns to Kyle for support while Dorit maintains she's done nothing wrong.

programme.title: E8 - Do You Remember?!?
programme.desc: The tension continues at Dorit and Erika's birthday dinner as Kyle is pulled into the middle of Amanda and Dorit's drama.

programme.title: E9 - Vacation And Manifestation
programme.desc: Dorit sits down with Mauricio in hopes of breaking through to PK. Sutton gets emotional while opening up to her daughter about her name change.

programme.title: E13 - Read The Room
programme.desc: Bozoma pulls out all the stops for the first night in Italy, including a surprise operatic performance.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E21 - Duck Schnitzel With Sweet Potato Waffles
programme.desc: Chef Deborah takes the chicken and waffles to the next level with her duck schnitzel and sweet potato waffles. She marinates and fries the duck, then mixes baked sweet potatoes with egg, milk and spices.

programme.desc: A large-scale leopard attack near Cape Town leaves thirty-three penguins dead. The sole survivor is picked up by rangers and rushed to Sanccob – but will he make it?

programme.desc: Africa is a continent with huge biodiversity, wonderful wildlife viewing opportunities, and a large selection of dangerous animals.

programme.desc: Forrest searches for the White Wolf, a predator that was declared extinct in 1930. They meet a hunter that shot what is believed to be a wolf.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: E6 - Jasper, Terry, and Gumbo
programme.desc: Embrace an invasive nutria who’s become part of the family, paddle around with Gumbo the goose, and visit a blind hedgehog and his human chum. Explore a swimmer’s bond with wild gray seals and hang out with Cosima the monkey and Jasper the serval.

programme.title: E3 - Rocco, Harold and Cindy
programme.desc: Follow Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of Harold Custard the rockhopper penguin, and feel the love as Barista cares for Cindy the baboon in her golden years. Later, say an emotional goodbye as Rocco the wombat returns to the wild.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Follow four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band - to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: E3 - Madagascar in Cold Blood
programme.desc: Explore the lives of Madagascar’s cold-blooded creatures. Chameleons, frog, lizards, and snakes have all adapted in order to survive on the island. We take a look at how they find food, reproduce, and avoid predators.

programme.title: E1 - Monkey Garden
programme.desc: Explore the southern edge of the Pantanal, where brown capuchin monkeys live in their own Garden of Eden. Dry season in the highlands treats them well until a drought dries up their food sources. Can an industrious agouti save them from starvation?

programme.title: E2 - Bird Paradise
programme.desc: Every year, the southern wetlands of the Pantanal become a bird paradise as over 650 species of rare and iconic birds congregate here for the breeding season.

programme.title: Osprey: Sea Raptor
programme.desc: Wade into a saltwater marsh along the Connecticut River to witness the heartwarming reunion of two ospreys who’ve been mates for a decade. Witness their highs and lows over a single summer as they raise their chicks and dodge a host of predators.

programme.title: E17 - The Camping Badge

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: E22 - Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: E40 - Early Baby
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: E15 - Grey Headed Albatross
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Bird Island in Antarctica to help rescue a grey-headed albatross chick that gets blown off its nest during a storm.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.desc: Max and Monty's antics on a construction site get them into trouble.

programme.title: E43 - Bird Migration: Spain & Africa
programme.desc: In this aerial adventure the Go Jetters are on the Strait of Gibraltar, Southern Spain to follow a group of migrating baby stalks as they make their journey from Spain to Africa.

programme.title: E16 - Pow Tao
programme.desc: Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?

programme.title: E17 - The Chickening
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: E4 - Treasure In The Plant Aisle
programme.desc: In the perilous plant aisle Supertato and Evil Pea team up to find treasure as they have half a map each, but she tricks him and steals the map to find the treasure for herself.

programme.title: E5 - Operation Jewel
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Tomato's precious jewel. Supertato ventures to get it back by secretly lifting the jewel from Evil Pea's crown and defeating a crowd of rampaging Mini Peas.

programme.title: E16 - The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E17 - The Camping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping and they hear a scary noise outside the tent!

programme.title: E18 - The Making Friends Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E21 - Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: E22 - Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: E40 - Early Baby
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

To Be Number One
programme.desc: The story of Ho, a chinese peasant/slave worker who escapes to Hong Kong and becomes one of the most feared crime bosses in Hong Kong.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: The Ng family: Doctor Ng, Mrs. Ng, Ng Chee, Ng Lei and Ng Choi went to picnic happily. Hereon, different romances happened between them: First of all, Lei was attracted by Macdonna, a very sexy girl; Chee loved little Rambo who saved her from two 'teddy' boys; Choi loved her elder cousin who was graduated from a foreign university and had not found a job yet; Mrs. Ng decided to apply for the post of actress for a drama association. Billy, the director of the drama was the divorced father of little Rambo. He fell in love with Mrs. Ng at the first sight...

programme.title: Mr Vampire III
programme.desc: One dark night, a charlatan Uncle Ming attempts to exorcise angry spirits in a haunted house but is unsuccessful and he narrowly escapes. He brings his two ghostly companions Ta Pao and Hsi Pao with him to a nearby town. The town is under attack by a group of bandits with supernatural powers. The thugs are led by Devil Lady, a powerful evil witch doctor. When Ming and the Paos are having dinner in a restaurant, Captain Chiang comes to harass them, and the Paos take revenge by playing tricks on Chiang. Just then, Chiang's master, Uncle Nine, appears and he subdues the two ghosts and traps them inside a wine jar. Ming pleads with Nine to release the Paos. Nine agrees to set the ghosts free but warns Ming that he must part ways with them, but Ta Pao is captured by Devil Lady later due to Chiang's act of mischief...

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

From Competition To Combat: Athletes In The Baltic States Prepare For Defen
programme.desc: In the Baltic states, athletes are preparing for more than just competition. As Russia's war in Ukraine reshapes Europe's security landscape, athletes in Latvia, Lithuania and Estonia balance elite training with military service. From conscription to volunteer defense leagues, their skills are increasingly tied to national defense, blurring the line between being an athlete and a soldier.

programme.title: Born In Bethlehem - A Clinic Full Of Hope - Part 2

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E1 - Relaxing Sounds for Babies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E5 - Let's Play Dress Up with Baby John!
programme.desc: It's time to play dress up with Baby John & his family! First, they put on funny costumes & have a disco dance party in the living room! Then, Jill helps the whole family be as stylish as they can be in fun & silly costumes. The dress-up fun continues as Baby John, Jack & Jill pretend to be police officers for the day & superheroes who help keep the playground safe & clean!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. programme.desc: A jungle girl, raised by possums, shows up at CDMS, posing a threat to Adam's status as the SHOC - Sole Human On Campus.

programme.title: Five Nights At Freddy's 2
programme.desc: After shattering the box office with a global gross of $292M and becoming Blumhouse's highest-grossing film ever, Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria is reopening its doors. Director Emma Tammi returns to helm the eagerly anticipated sequel, promising a chilling new chapter with a bone-chilling warning: Anyone can survive five nights, this time, there will be no second chances…

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind'
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Hidden Buddhist Statues Revealed
programme.desc: 2026 marks a rare year when hidden Buddhist images are revealed to the public. Some are unveiled only once every 33 years. Others, kept on sacred mountaintops since the Heian period, are brought down for the first time. This program explores the mysteries behind the unveiling of Buddhist statues in Japan.

programme.title: The Lady Improper
programme.desc: Born in a culinary family, Siu Man has always led an ideal life - Good grades, a financially viable job and a loving husband. But one thing has always plagued her: A fear of intimacy. After the end of her sexless marriage and several life crises, Siu Man reboots her life by taking over her father's restaurant. She hires Jiahao, a ‘culinary philosopher' who takes a creative approach to cooking. To help save the restaurant, Jiahao decides to mentor Siu Man, opening her up to his culinary world. In the process, Siu Man becomes attracted to his masculinity, intelligence and his mastery of culinary skills. After seeing her usually conservative friends let loose at a wedding party, Siu Man realizes that it's time to tackle her fear of intimacy head-on. With the help of a new friend, Siu Man embarks on a journey of liberation, starting with pole dancing lessons and returning to the dating scene. programme.title: E8 - I'll See You In C.U.B.A.
programme.desc: Jeannie blinks Tony's automated plane to Cuba, instead of Puerto Rico.

programme.title: E6 - The Blue Geranium (Part 2)
programme.desc: While visiting a friend in Little Ambrose, Miss Marple investigates a man’s apparent drowning, followed by more suspicious deaths. When George Pritchard confesses, Marple doubts the conclusion and tries to prove another explanation.

programme.title: E15 - Warrior… Princess

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: As he starts the final part of his journey deep into Iraq, Michael finds a local school in Baghdad and as he did in North Korea talks to the children about life in Iraq and what they hope to do in the future, and how they see the rest of the world. Michael then visits the ancient site of Babylon, a place he used to read about when he was studying the bible at school. He also gets access to enter the massive palace built by Saddam Hussein that overlooks the historic site.

E8 - Pigeon & Wild Mushrooms
programme.desc: Far from the urban jungle, Daniel teams up with chef Alan Bergo to hunt the original poultry — pigeons, and also forages for mushrooms and greens from the Wisconsin landscape.

programme.title: E4 - David and Denis With Terence
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiast David seeks a remote, off-the-grid weekend cabin near mountain biking and back-country snowboarding.

programme.title: E9 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E20 - The Colors Of The Esterel
programme.desc: It is a jewel with the look of a Grand Canyon. 250 million years ago, the volcanic massif of the Esterel separated from Africa when the Mediterranean was forming. Between Cannes and Saint-Tropez, the Esterel covers the south-east of the Var and extends into the Alpes-Maritimes. Cliffs, forests, sea, its landscapes are astonishing...

programme.title: E9 - Crossing A Glacier
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas explore the Wapta Glacier, on the border of Alberta and British Columbia, to discover what characterizes glacier skiing.

programme.title: E5 - Retro Camping
programme.desc: In Calvados, Laurent shares a bit of the daily life of retro campers. From the vehicle to the dishes, everything is vintage! Focus on the Citroen Dyane, overshadowed by the 2 CV, the Renault 9 and a BMW queen of tuning.

programme.title: E4 - Split Pea Veloute, Chickpea Gnocchi
programme.desc: Accompanied by Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers a coconut curry split pea veloute and chickpea gnocchi. Discovery of the day: cold-pressed fruit juices from Valais.

programme.title: E1 - Terroirs Of Excellence In The Provencal Alps
programme.desc: From Saint-Paul-de-Vence to the Roya Valley, in the hinterland of Nice, enthusiasts are fighting to promote their territory. By reviving an old perfume house or creating a high-end spirit with small spelt, these artisans are committed to preserving their precious heritage.

programme.title: E10 - Spices Of The Fenua, An Invitation To Travel
programme.desc: Some spices arrived in Tahiti by chance, along the routes of travel. Others are grown locally. All of them, in any case, play a major role in local cuisine and in recipes passed down from generation to generation.

Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.
